case_title: COVETTER WILEY VS. BINH NGUYEN et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-01-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-20-2002 CONTINUED TO MAY-01-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. MAR-20-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILEY,COVETTER AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, BINH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-08-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-10-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-10-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-08-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-08-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST CRAIG K. MARTIN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN 8,2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-28-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY DEBORAH NEVILLE.(212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-20-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-08-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST CRAIG K. MARTIN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-01-2002, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-16-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY PATRICIA J. VANSTEENBERGE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-01-2002 CONTINUED TO JUL-03-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). MAY-01-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2002, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
